hotel_name: Hampton Inn  Suites by Hilton Long Island Farmingdale

reviews.title: Should have skipped Hampton.
reviews.positives: It was near where we needed to be.
reviews.negatives:
We paid for a king suite abd they sold out. The next morning still sold out. The room they gave us, with two queens was not good. It is quite cramped, the beds were not comfortable.
If they cannot honor reservations they should let you know in advance so you can change hotels.
We both feel Hampton Inns have become not the place for us. Back the Marriott properties.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: I am extremely disappointed with Breakfast. I understand that many hotels have limited breakfast options but this particular hotel was not even keeping the limited options stocked. I stayed 3 days, made a mistake to join breakfast on first Day at 8 am and after seeing that they don't have a concept of restocking, attendant Angela hides behind door, I didn't bother coming for breakfast next 2 mornings. Please stop fooling your guest. After this experience, I will think 1000 times before booking again with Hamptons. Shame to the manager who and owner.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: The eggs served for breakfast were terrible.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice, clean, new hotel with anindoor pool and jacuzzi.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast could have been better.

reviews.title: If you’re staying in Scranton for any amount of time, this is the best option.  Especially for the price.
reviews.positives: Property was high end and super unique. Centrally located and on site parking.  There isn’t another hotel I would consider staying in the area.
reviews.negatives: My only complaint is my room wasn’t ready until after 7 o’clock.  So I had to wait a lot longer than the 3 o’clock check in time.

reviews.title: Will probably return.
reviews.positives: Wasn't crazy about breakfast.    Wife thought it was fine.

reviews.title: We were there very briefly but it met our needs

reviews.title: Very good!
reviews.positives: The room and facility was nice, clean, and bright. Good shower pressure. Free coffee, tea, hot cocoa, and beer
reviews.negatives: The king bed was a little too firm for my back and pillows small and flat for bed size. Overall very happy with my stay and would stay again.

reviews.title: Clean welcoming hotel

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Absolutely amazing stay! We traveled with our kids (ages 4 and 6) and everything exceeded our expectations. The hotel was spotless, the rooms felt brand new, and the pool was perfect for families — our children didn’t want to leave!

The staff was incredibly friendly, welcoming, and always ready to help. You can really tell they care about their guests and keep the hotel at a very high standard.

One of the best hotel experiences we’ve had. Highly recommend for families — we will definitely come back!
reviews.negatives: There is nothing i didnt like

reviews.title: Excellent stay at a great rate thru Booking.com

reviews.title: It’s everything I expect from Hampton Inn
reviews.positives: It is in a great location. Staff were friendly. Breakfast was plentiful and food replaced as needed. Staff at breakfast were friendly and helpful. We will definitely come back.
reviews.negatives: Nothing everything was great! Very clean and quiet.

reviews.title: Alojamiento nuevo y cómodo
reviews.positives:
Buena ubicación, cerca de comercios, restaurantes y centros comerciales, en una linda zona. 
La habitación estaba bastante amplia y cómoda.

reviews.title: New hotel with much left to be desired
reviews.positives: Breakfast, and brand new facility.
reviews.negatives: No daily housekeeping.  Even though the hotel is brand new the rooms felt dated. Pricey for what you get.

reviews.title: Nice hotel and good location.
reviews.positives: Very clean, lovely staff.
reviews.negatives:
Room had dividing door. I could hear the person in the adjoining room.
Breakfast finished at 9am midweek.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice and new hotel with a friendly staff . Good breakfast, big parking, comfortable bed.
reviews.negatives: You can hear the neighbours talking from the nearest room .

reviews.title: Nice facility with room for improvement
reviews.positives: Brand new hotel only opened six days when we stayed, rooms were spotless and you could still smell the fresh paint. Some staff were still in training, however all staff were kind and courteous whenever i interacted with them. Farmingdale is a lovely town.
reviews.negatives: Sound proofing could have been better for such a new facility, we could hear our neighbours normal conversation and road noise was also audible. It wasn’t overwhelming rather off putting. Hotels policy was to clean rooms every third day of your stay, on our third day housekeeping tried to clean our room at 1730 when we were getting ready to attend a function, we told them not to bother as we were leaving the next day. I’m sure this is a teething problem which hopefully will be sorted out in time.

reviews.title: Perfect location
reviews.positives: Friendly staff and clean
reviews.negatives: Drinks prices at kiosk

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The suites were lovely , very spacious and light. Had a huge comfy bed. The breakfast was incredible value.
reviews.negatives: The only thing we have to criticise is how payment between booking.com and the hotel is made as we were nearly charged again when we got there for our stay that added stress. And I think to make the suites even better is provide some plates and cutlery and maybe some glasses to help with preparing a meal in the room.
